V : Type u_3
inst✝² : AddCommGroup V
inst✝¹ : Module ℚ V
inst✝ : FiniteDimensional ℚ V
φ : V ≃ₗ[ℚ] V
hφ :
  ∀ᶠ (v : IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum (RingOfIntegers ℚ)) in Filter.cofinite,
    Set.BijOn
      ⇑((fun v =>
            ContinuousLinearEquiv.toContinuousAddEquiv
              (@Aux.continuousBaseChange V inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletion ℚ v)
                (UniformSpace.Completion.commRing (WithVal (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.valuation ℚ v)))
                (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.instAlgebraAdicCompletion (RingOfIntegers ℚ) ℚ v)
                (UniformSpace.Completion.uniformSpace
                    (WithVal (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.valuation ℚ v))).toTopologicalSpace
                ⋯ φ))
          v)
      ↑((↑(@Aux.c_v_alg V inst✝² inst✝¹ v)).toAddMonoidHom.comp
            (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V)
                (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ
                        v).subtype.toAddMonoidHom.toIntLinearMap).toAddMonoidHom).range
      ↑((↑(@Aux.c_v_alg V inst✝² inst✝¹ v)).toAddMonoidHom.comp
            (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V)
                (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ
                        v).subtype.toAddMonoidHom.toIntLinearMap).toAddMonoidHom).range
⊢ addEquivAddHaarChar
        (ContinuousLinearEquiv.toContinuousAddEquiv
          (@Aux.continuousBaseChange V inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ (InfiniteAdeleRing ℚ) (InfiniteAdeleRing.instCommRing ℚ)
            (InfiniteAdeleRing.instAlgebra_fLT_1 ℚ ℚ) (InfiniteAdeleRing.instTopologicalSpace ℚ) ⋯ φ)) *
      ∏ᶠ (i : IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum (RingOfIntegers ℚ)),
        addEquivAddHaarChar
          (ContinuousLinearEquiv.toContinuousAddEquiv
            (@Aux.continuousBaseChange V inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletion ℚ i)
              (UniformSpace.Completion.commRing (WithVal (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.valuation ℚ i)))
              (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.instAlgebraAdicCompletion (RingOfIntegers ℚ) ℚ i)
              (UniformSpace.Completion.uniformSpace
                  (WithVal (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.valuation ℚ i))).toTopologicalSpace
              ⋯ φ)) =
    1
